---
title: "Pennsylvania Map"
output: html_document
---

```{r}

library(leaflet)
library(sf)

CensusTracts <- sf::read_sf("./CensusTracts/tl_2025_42_tract.shp")

map <- leaflet::leaflet() |> 
  leaflet::addTiles() |>
  leaflet::setView(lng = -77.86, lat = 40.79, zoom = 14) |>
  leaflet::addPolygons(data = CensusTracts)

map

```
